videos.title: Your Jeep's Suspension is Lying to You. Let's Fix That
videos.description:
Your Jeep's suspension has been lying to you. 
And honestly? We let it happen.

#JeepSuspension #JeepLift #OffRoad

In this episode of 2 Dudes 1 Wrench we stop nodding along and actually explain what's going on underneath your rig.

Lift kits. Drop brackets. Springs and shocks. Geometry correction. Everyone throws these words around like you already know what they mean, and nobody stops to explain why any of it actually matters.
Until now.
We break down Jeep suspension from the ground up in this

videos.title: Axle SNAPS Mid-Climb at EJS (BRUTAL!)
videos.description:
What started as an epic day at Easter Jeep Safari 2026 quickly turned into a full-blown test of our rigs and patience as my friend snaps an axle mid-obstacle and my Jeep battles ongoing electrical issues—but that didn’t stop us from pushing forward. We tackle some seriously fun and technical Moab terrain, troubleshoot on the fly, and somehow keep the adventure alive through all the chaos. Breakdowns, trail fixes, and plenty of laughs—this is what off-roading is all about.

Enjoy 3W Easter Jeep S

videos.title: State of Power Platform & Copilot in 2026 (380 Real Responses)
videos.description:
Everyone is talking about Copilot and AI… but what is actually happening inside real organizations?

I asked 380 of you about Power Platform and Copilot. Your confidence levels, what you are building, and where you need help. In this video, you’re going to see the real data behind where the community is today and where things are heading in 2026.

You’ll learn:
- How confident teams really are with Power Platform vs Copilot
- What organizations are focusing on next (training, governance, AI use

videos.title: A New Way to Build Canvas Apps 🚀 (Power Apps MCP Server)
videos.description:
Power Apps is evolving — and with AI code generation tools on the rise, Canvas Apps are evolving too. Introducing the Canvas Apps Authoring MCP Server — a new way to build and enhance apps faster using tools like GitHub Copilot CLI and Claude Code.

In this video, I walk through how the MCP Server enables a more efficient development experience — while keeping you fully in control.

This is not about AI replacing developers.
It’s about removing repetitive work and accelerating how you build apps
